specific_question: What percentage of customers who used the online scheduler in the CRM to schedule a digital test drive resulted in a vehicle purchase from Elexion Automotive?
answer: As of September 2025 CRM reports, 35% of customers who used the online scheduler to schedule a digital test drive resulted in a vehicle purchase.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
